0.8.33.en: Fix: voltage system now always auto-detected â€” customers with old manual setting are self-healed on update. EV Charger Preferences now shows detected phase count per charger (1-phase / 3-phase). Slow charge hint corrected to 'no deadline set' instead of misleading 'price is moderate'. Removed redundant EV Charger virtual device driver. Fixed: priority list wording now consistently says top of list is turned off first.
0.8.33.no: Fiks: spenningssystem oppdages nĂĄ alltid automatisk â€” kunder med gammel manuell innstilling blir automatisk korrigert ved oppdatering. EV-laderinnstillinger viser nĂĄ oppdaget faseantall per lader (1-fase / 3-fase). Hint for Saktlading rettet til 'ingen frist satt' i stedet for misvisende 'prisen er moderat'. Fjernet overflĂ¸dig virtuell EV-laderenhet. Fiks: prioritetslisten sier nĂĄ konsekvent at toppen av listen slĂĄs av fĂ¸rst.

0.8.32.en: Fixed: EV charger not pausing when price mode is Off â€” the current calculator now correctly returns a pause command when the price cap is zero, instead of sending 0A which some charger brands (Easee) ignored. EV status: Price Level label on EV tab now matches the Price tab format (Cheap / Normal / Expensive / Extreme).
0.8.32.no: Fiks: EV-lader satte seg ikke pĂĄ pause nĂĄr prismodus var Av â€” strĂ¸mkalkulatoren returnerer nĂĄ korrekt pause-kommando nĂĄr pristak er null, i stedet for ĂĄ sende 0A som noen ladermerker (Easee) ignorerte. EV-status: PrisnivĂĄ-etikett pĂĄ EV-fanen viser nĂĄ samme format som Pris-fanen (Billig / Normal / Dyrt / Ekstremt).

0.8.31.en: Added Help tab (sub-tab under Home â†’ after System) covering getting started, EV charger setup, smart charging, modes, and hardware. Smart charging: all chargers now share one cheapest-hours window â€” the car that needs the most time sets the window, and available current is split equally between chargers. EV status: Charger Mode is now shown per charger and hidden when no car is connected. Charger Mode labels rewritten for clarity: short label with a plain-language hint line (e.g. Fast charge / cheap hour, Off / waiting for cheap hour).
0.8.31.no: Lagt til Hjelp-fane (underfane under Hjem â†’ etter System) med innhold om komme i gang, EV-laderoppsett, smart lading, modi og stĂ¸ttet hardware. Smart lading: alle ladere deler nĂĄ ett billigste-timer-vindu â€” bilen som trenger mest tid setter vinduets stĂ¸rrelse, og tilgjengelig strĂ¸m fordeles likt mellom ladere. EV-status: Ladermodus vises nĂĄ per lader og skjules nĂĄr ingen bil er tilkoblet. Ladermodus-etiketter omskrevet for klarhet: kort etikett med forklarende hjelpetekst (f.eks. Hurtiglading / billig time, Av / venter pĂĄ billig time).

0.8.24.en: New: EV battery scheduling via Flow action â€” report your car's battery % to Power Guard and it automatically calculates hours needed to reach your charge target. The smart charging engine now uses this to decide when to charge, pause, or slow down based on remaining cheap hours before your deadline. Fixed: with Norgespris flat-rate pricing (spread = 0), the charger could get permanently stuck in pause mode because the price hysteresis required a price difference that doesn't exist on flat rate â€” now correctly exits pause and resumes charging. Fixed: 'Next cheap hour' and 'Next expensive hour' now show 'All equal' instead of 'â€”' when Norgespris flat rate is active. Fixed: price level badge and chart bar now always agree for the current hour. Battery report panel always visible in Smart â†’ EV tab.
0.8.24.no: Nytt: EV-batteri-planlegging via Flow-kort â€” rapporter bilens batteriprosent til Power Guard og den beregner automatisk timer nĂ¸dvendig for ĂĄ nĂĄ lademĂĄlet. Smart ladelogikk bruker dette til ĂĄ avgjĂ¸re nĂĄr bilen skal lades, pauses eller bremses basert pĂĄ gjenvĂ¦rende billigtimer fĂ¸r fristen. Fiks: med Norgespris fastpris (spread = 0) kunne laderen bli permanent satt pĂĄ pause fordi prishysteresen krevde en prisforskjell som ikke finnes pĂĄ fastpris â€” starter nĂĄ ladingen korrekt. Fiks: 'Neste billigtid' og 'Neste dyre time' viser nĂĄ 'Alle like' i stedet for 'â€”' nĂĄr Norgespris er aktiv. Fiks: prisnivĂĄ-badge og sĂ¸ylediagram er nĂĄ alltid i samsvar for gjeldende time. Batterirapport-panel alltid synlig i Smart â†’ EV-fanen.

0.8.16.en: Added FutureHome El-bil Lader support (pause/resume via evcharger_charging). Fixed advanced settings (Safety Buffer, Missing Data Timeout, Dynamic Restore Guard) not being saved or loaded correctly. Number inputs for timeouts now change by 1s per click for precise control. New EV Smart Charging panel in Smart â†’ EV tab: live status from Homey Logic variables (bil_tilkoblet, bil_lader_nĂĄ, burde_lade_bilen, lademodus, strĂ¸mpris) and charging schedule inputs (hours needed + finish by time) for HomeyScript v8.3 integration.
0.8.16.no: Lagt til stĂ¸tte for FutureHome El-bil Lader (pause/gjenopptak via evcharger_charging). Fikset at avanserte innstillinger (Sikkerhetsmargin, Manglende data-timeout, Dynamisk gjenopprettingsvakt) ikke ble lagret eller lastet korrekt. Tallinputt for tidsavbrudd endres nĂĄ med 1s per klikk for presis kontroll. Ny EV Smart Lading-panel i Smart â†’ EV-fanen: sanntidsstatus fra Homey Logic-variabler (bil_tilkoblet, bil_lader_nĂĄ, burde_lade_bilen, lademodus, strĂ¸mpris) og ladeplansinnstillinger (timer nĂ¸dvendig + ferdig innen) for HomeyScript v8.3-integrasjon.

0.8.15.en: UI: Advanced Mode Active notice moved to Settings tab. Managed Chargers card moves to Smart â†’ EV tab when Smart Price Control is enabled. EV tab now shows Charger Preferences above Managed Chargers. Active tab now highlighted with orange bottom border.
0.8.15.no: UI: Avansert modus-varsel flyttet til Innstillinger-fanen. Administrerte ladere flyttes til Smart â†’ EV-fanen nĂĄr Smart Priskontroll er aktivert. EV-fanen viser nĂĄ Laderinnstillinger Ă¸verst. Aktiv fane markeres med oransje kant nederst.

0.8.11.en: Fixed: Night schedule time steppers were hidden when switching to 'Use Homey night hours' â€” they are now always visible.
0.8.11.no: Fiks: Nattplan-tidsvelgerne ble skjult ved valg av 'Bruk Homey nattimer' â€” de er nĂĄ alltid synlige.

0.8.0.en: Added Home / Night / Away / Holiday mode engine

0.7.17.en: Fixed: HĂ¸iax water heater was turning off immediately instead of stepping down (high â†’ medium â†’ low â†’ off). This happened when the current power level was not yet reported by the HĂ¸iax app â€” Power Guard now defaults to stepping down from high_power instead of jumping straight to off.
0.7.17.no: Fiks: HĂ¸iax varmtvannsbereder ble slĂĄtt av direkte i stedet for ĂĄ trappes ned (hĂ¸y â†’ middels â†’ lav â†’ av). Dette skjedde nĂĄr nĂĄvĂ¦rende effektnivĂĄ ikke var rapportert av HĂ¸iax-appen â€” Power Guard setter nĂĄ effekten ett steg ned fra hĂ¸y i stedet for ĂĄ slĂĄ av med en gang.

0.7.16.en: Added: Enua charger is now recognised by Power Guard and can be paused/resumed during overload mitigation. Note: the Enua Homey app does not expose a current-control capability, so only on/off (pause/resume charging) is supported for now â€” dynamic current stepping is not possible until Enua adds that to their app.
0.7.16.no: Lagt til: Enua-lader gjenkjennes nĂĄ av Power Guard og kan settes pĂĄ pause/gjenopptas under effektbegrensning. Merk: Enua sin Homey-app eksponerer ikke noen strĂ¸mstyringsfunksjon, sĂĄ kun av/pĂĄ (pause/gjenoppta lading) stĂ¸ttes forelopig â€” dynamisk strĂ¸mstyring er ikke mulig fĂ¸r Enua legger det til i sin app.

0.7.15.en: Fixed: HĂ¸iax water heater with max_power_2000 capability (2000W model) was not being stepped down â€” only on/off was used. Power stepping now works correctly for all HĂ¸iax Connected models (2kW and 3kW).
0.7.15.no: Fiks: HĂ¸iax varmtvannsbereder med max_power_2000-kapabilitet (2000W-modell) ble ikke trappet ned â€” kun av/pĂĄ ble brukt. Effekttrapping fungerer nĂĄ korrekt for alle HĂ¸iax Connected-modeller (2kW og 3kW).

0.7.14.en: Fixed: EV charger would not restart after being paused, even when power was available. The charger required 7600W of free headroom before it could restart (enough for 11A on 3-phase) â€” if only 5000W was free the charger stayed paused forever. Now the charger restarts at whatever current the budget allows (minimum 6A), and only uses the full 11A soft-start when the budget supports it.
0.7.14.no: Fiks: EV-laderen startet ikke igjen etter pause selv om det var nok effekt tilgjengelig. Laderen krevde 7600W fri kapasitet fĂ¸r den kunne starte (nok til 11A pĂĄ 3-fase) â€” hvis bare 5000W var ledig ble laderen stĂĄende pĂĄ pause for alltid. NĂĄ starter laderen pĂĄ den strĂ¸mmen budsjettet tillater (minimum 6A), og bruker bare full 11A myk-start nĂĄr budsjettet er stort nok.

0.7.13.en: Fixed: EV charger was stuck in an oscillation loop â€” the restore routine was resetting the charger back to 32A every time power dipped under the limit, undoing all reductions. Charger current is now managed exclusively by the EV adjust logic. Fixed: EV charger now always resumes from pause at a safe 11A instead of jumping straight to full current. Fixed: current calculation now floors instead of rounds so it never exceeds the power budget. Fixed: small 1A reductions were being silently skipped even when the house was still over the limit.
0.7.13.no: Fiks: EV-laderen satt fast i en oscillasjonsloop â€” gjenopprettingsrutinen satte laderen tilbake til 32A hver gang effekten gikk under grensen og angret alle reduksjoner. LaderstrĂ¸m styres nĂĄ utelukkende av EV-justeringslogikken. Fiks: EV-lader starter nĂĄ alltid fra pause med trygg 11A startstrĂ¸m. Fiks: strĂ¸mberegning bruker nĂĄ gulv i stedet for runding slik at effektbudsjettet aldri overskrides. Fiks: 1A-justeringer blokkeres ikke lenger nĂĄr husholdningen fortsatt er over grensen.

0.7.12.en: Fixed: EV charger now always resumes from pause at a safe 11A start current instead of jumping straight to the calculated optimal (which could overshoot the limit). Fixed: proportional current calculation now floors instead of rounds so it never exceeds the power budget. Fixed: 1A adjustments are no longer skipped when the household is still over the limit â€” small reductions were being silently blocked.
0.7.12.no: Fiks: EV-lader starter nĂĄ alltid fra pause med trygg 11A startstrĂ¸m i stedet for ĂĄ hoppe rett til beregnet optimal strĂ¸m (som kunne overskride grensen). Fiks: proporsjonal strĂ¸mberegning bruker nĂĄ gulv i stedet for runding slik at effektbudsjettet aldri overskrides. Fiks: 1A-justeringer blokkeres ikke lenger nĂĄr husholdningen fortsatt er over grensen.

0.7.11.en: Fixed: 'mitigation cleared' flow trigger now includes the device name token (was crashing silently). EV charger 'Device controlled' badge now clears automatically when charging is complete. Fixed app startup failure caused by wrong Homey SDK v3 flow card API calls â€” flow triggers now fire correctly.
0.7.11.no: Fiks: Flyt-trigger 'tiltak fjernet' inneholder nĂĄ enhetsnavn-tokenet (krasjet stille fĂ¸r). EV-lader 'Enhetsstyrt'-merket fjernes nĂĄ automatisk nĂĄr ladingen er ferdig. Fiks: app-krasj ved oppstart forĂĄrsaket av feil Homey SDK v3 API-kall er rettet.

0.7.1.en: EV charger Device controlled badge clears on charge complete. Flow card API corrected for SDK v3.

0.6.61.en: Bug fixes for Adax heaters and Tuya floor thermostats: power estimation now scoped to Adax devices only. Thermostat toggle in Heaters tab now correctly reflects enabled/disabled state (not heating state). Fixed thermostat on/off toggle being stuck OFF when room was already at setpoint.

0.6.2.en: Multi-charger support: available headroom is now pooled and split evenly across all actively charging cars â€” a second connected-but-idle car no longer steals half the budget. EV charger phase count (1-phase / 3-phase) is now auto-detected from the live power/current ratio; no manual electrical config needed. Strict profile raised to 95% safety margin. Devices tab now always shows the EV charger as controlled by Power Guard while a car is connected and charging. Fixed a calculation bug that could cause charger current adjustments to be silently skipped.
0.6.2.no: StĂ¸tte for flere ladere: tilgjengelig effekt samles og fordeles likt mellom alle biler som faktisk lader â€” en tilkoblet-men-hvilende bil stjeler ikke lenger halve budsjettet. Fase-antall for EV-lader (enfase / trefase) detekteres nĂĄ automatisk fra live effekt/strĂ¸m-forholdet; ingen manuell konfigurasjon trengs. Streng profil hevet til 95% sikkerhetsmargin. Enheter-fanen viser nĂĄ alltid EV-laderen som styrt av Power Guard mens en bil er tilkoblet og lader. Rettet en beregningsfeil som kunne fĂ¸re til at strĂ¸mjusteringer ble stille hoppet over.

0.6.1.en: Multi-charger support: available headroom is now pooled and split evenly across all actively charging cars â€” a second connected-but-idle car no longer steals half the budget. EV charger phase count (1-phase / 3-phase) is now auto-detected from the live power/current ratio; no manual electrical config needed. Strict profile raised to 95% safety margin. Settings migration resets voltageSystem to auto on first start after update. Devices tab now always shows the EV charger as controlled by Power Guard while a car is connected and charging. Fixed a calculation bug that could cause charger current adjustments to be silently skipped.
0.6.1.no: StĂ¸tte for flere ladere: tilgjengelig effekt samles og fordeles likt mellom alle biler som faktisk lader â€” en tilkoblet-men-hvilende bil stjeler ikke lenger halve budsjettet. Fase-antall for EV-lader (enfase / trefase) detekteres nĂĄ automatisk fra live effekt/strĂ¸m-forholdet; ingen manuell konfigurasjon trengs. Streng profil hevet til 95% sikkerhetsmargin. Innstillingsmigrering nullstiller spenningssystem til auto ved fĂ¸rste oppstart etter oppdatering. Enheter-fanen viser nĂĄ alltid EV-laderen som styrt av Power Guard mens en bil er tilkoblet og lader. Rettet en beregningsfeil som kunne fĂ¸re til at strĂ¸mjusteringer ble stille hoppet over.

0.3.23.en: Fix: EV charger no longer stays at 7A minimum when house base load alone exceeds the power limit. The phase-based control path now correctly pauses charging when household consumption (without the charger) exceeds the watt limit, matching the behavior of the wattage-based fallback path.
0.3.23.no: Fix: EV-lader holdes ikke lenger pĂĄ 7A minimum nĂĄr husforbruket alene overstiger effektgrensen. Den fasebaserte styringsveien pauser nĂĄ ladingen korrekt nĂĄr husforbruket (uten laderen) overstiger watt-grensen, tilsvarende oppfĂ¸rselen i den wattagebaserte reserveveien.

0.3.22.en: Auto-detect electrical system phase count from HAN sensor: 'Auto-detect from HAN sensor' is now the default voltage system setting. The app reads live phase current data (L1/L2/L3) and meter capabilities to automatically determine whether the installation is single-phase (230V) or three-phase (400V). Manual override is still available. Settings page shows the detected system type in real time.
0.3.22.no: Auto-gjenkjenn fase-antall fra HAN-sensor: 'Auto-gjenkjenn fra HAN-sensor' er nĂĄ standard innstilling for spenningssystem. Appen leser sanntids fase-strĂ¸m (L1/L2/L3) og mĂĄlerfunksjoner for ĂĄ automatisk avgjĂ¸re om anlegget er enfase (230V) eller trefase (400V). Manuell overstyring er fortsatt mulig. Innstillingssiden viser oppdaget systemtype i sanntid.

0.2.22.en: New diagnostic Log tab for remote debugging: consolidated app log with category filters (HAN, Charger, Mitigation, Energy, Cache, System), color-coded badges, copy-to-clipboard (filtered or full JSON), auto-refresh, HAN meter summary, mitigation scan results, and system info. Makes it easy to share diagnostic data when reporting issues.
0.2.22.no: Ny diagnostikk-loggfane for feilsĂ¸king: samlet app-logg med kategorifiltre (HAN, Lader, Tiltak, Energi, Cache, System), fargekodede merkelapper, kopier til utklippstavle (filtrert eller full JSON), auto-oppdatering, HAN-mĂĄler-sammendrag, tiltak-skanneresultater og systeminfo. GjĂ¸r det enkelt ĂĄ dele diagnostikkdata ved feilrapportering.

0.2.21.en: HĂ¸iax Connected 300/200 stepped power control: new 'Stepped power (HĂ¸iax)' action reduces water heater power one level per mitigation cycle (3000W â†’ 1750W â†’ 1250W â†’ off). Supports both HĂ¸iax 300 and 200 models. Driver icons fixed. Thermostat mitigation now lowers by 3Â°C instead of setting to 5Â°C.
0.2.21.no: HĂ¸iax Connected 300/200 trinnvis effektstyring: ny 'Trinnvis effekt (HĂ¸iax)'-handling reduserer varmtvannsbereder ett nivĂĄ per tiltakssyklus (3000W â†’ 1750W â†’ 1250W â†’ av). StĂ¸tter bĂĄde HĂ¸iax 300 og 200 modeller. Driverikoner fikset. Termostat-tiltak senker nĂĄ med 3Â°C i stedet for ĂĄ sette til 5Â°C.

0.2.2.en: Adax heater power estimation: detects when Adax reports constant rated wattage and estimates actual power from temperature state (room at target = 0W, room below target = rated wattage). Heater tab now correctly shows which Adax heaters are actively heating. Thermostat mitigation changed from setting to 5Â°C to lowering by 3Â°C from current target.
0.2.2.no: Adax-varmer effektestimering: oppdager nĂĄr Adax rapporterer konstant nominell effekt og estimerer faktisk forbruk fra temperaturstatus (rom pĂĄ mĂĄl = 0W, rom under mĂĄl = nominell effekt). Varmer-fanen viser nĂĄ korrekt hvilke Adax-varmere som aktivt varmer. Termostat-tiltak endret fra ĂĄ sette til 5Â°C til ĂĄ senke med 3Â°C fra nĂĄvĂ¦rende mĂĄl.

0.2.1.en: Fixed Zaptec and Enua dynamic current control on Homey setups where getFlowCardActions() does not enumerate app flow cards. Now falls back to hardcoded known action IDs (installation_current_control / changeCurrentLimitAction) when discovery returns nothing, instead of silently skipping current adjustments.
0.2.1.no: Fikset Zaptec og Enua dynamisk strĂ¸mstyring pĂĄ Homey-oppsett hvor getFlowCardActions() ikke lister app-flythandlinger. Faller nĂĄ tilbake til kjente action-IDer (installation_current_control / changeCurrentLimitAction) nĂĄr oppdagelse ikke finner noe, i stedet for ĂĄ hoppe over strĂ¸mjusteringer.

0.2.0.en: Dynamic flow action discovery: automatically finds the correct Flow action ID for Zaptec and Enua chargers at runtime. Improved test charger diagnostics with detailed Flow API reporting. No more hardcoded action IDs.
0.2.0.no: Dynamisk flow-action oppdagelse: finner automatisk riktig Flow action-ID for Zaptec og Enua ladere ved kjĂ¸ring. Forbedret ladertest-diagnostikk med detaljert Flow API-rapportering. Ingen flere hardkodede action-IDer.

0.1.9.en: Added dynamic current control for Zaptec and Enua chargers via Homey Flow API. Zaptec uses installation_current_control (0-40A per phase), Enua uses changeCurrentLimitAction (6-32A). Auto-detects charger brand and routes to correct handler. Added Zaptec car-connected detection. Full Enua Charge E support with pause/resume and status monitoring.
0.1.9.no: Lagt til dynamisk strĂ¸mstyring for Zaptec og Enua ladere via Homey Flow API. Zaptec bruker installation_current_control (0-40A per fase), Enua bruker changeCurrentLimitAction (6-32A). Auto-detekterer ladermerke og ruter til riktig handler. Lagt til Zaptec bil-tilkoblet deteksjon. Full Enua Charge E stĂ¸tte med pause/gjenopptak og statusovervĂĄking.

0.1.8.en: Fixed charger test diagnostic for Zaptec Go: now correctly detects charging_button capability and reports Zaptec charger status. Test no longer fails for non-Easee chargers.
0.1.8.no: Fikset ladertest-diagnostikk for Zaptec Go: oppdager nĂĄ charging_button-kapabilitet korrekt og rapporterer Zaptec-laderstatus. Testen feiler ikke lenger for ikke-Easee-ladere.

0.1.7.en: Fixed Easee Equalizer showing 0W: reads initial power value immediately on connect, faster first poll (2s), robust number handling for cloud-based meters.
0.1.7.no: Fikset Easee Equalizer som viste 0W: leser initial effektverdi umiddelbart ved tilkobling, raskere fĂ¸rste poll (2s), robust tallhĂĄndtering for skybaserte mĂĄlere.

0.1.6.en: Added manual power meter selection on the System tab. Fixed auto-detect falsely matching devices like 'Hanna Thermostat'. Improved Futurehome HAN and Easee Equalizer support.
0.1.6.no: Lagt til manuelt valg av effektmĂĄler pĂĄ System-fanen. Fikset auto-deteksjon som feilaktig matchet enheter som 'Hanna Thermostat'. Forbedret stĂ¸tte for Futurehome HAN og Easee Equalizer.

0.1.5.en: Added support for Easee Equalizer as HAN meter source and Zaptec charger detection. Expanded per-phase monitoring for Easee devices.
0.1.5.no: Lagt til stĂ¸tte for Easee Equalizer som HAN-mĂĄlerkilde og Zaptec-ladergjenkjenning. Utvidet faseovervĂĄking for Easee-enheter.

0.1.4.en: Initial release. Real-time power monitoring with HAN meter, smart EV charger control with dynamic current adjustment, thermostat management, priority-based mitigation, and Norwegian capacity tariff tracking.
0.1.4.no: FĂ¸rste utgivelse. Sanntids effektovervĂĄking med HAN-mĂĄler, smart elbilladerstyring med dynamisk strĂ¸mjustering, termostatstyring, prioritetsbasert tiltak, og norsk effekttariff-sporing.

0.3.21.en: Per-phase current control for EV chargers: app now reads live per-phase amps (A/B/C) from the HAN sensor (Futurehome HAN and Easee Equalizer supported) and uses them directly to calculate available charger current. Fixes charger being throttled to minimum when voltageSystem was misconfigured. Falls back to wattage-based calculation when phase data is unavailable.
0.3.21.no: Fasebasert strĂ¸mstyring for elbilladere: appen leser nĂĄ direktefase-ampere (A/B/C) fra HAN-sensoren (Futurehome HAN og Easee Equalizer stĂ¸ttes) og bruker disse til ĂĄ beregne tilgjengelig ladestrĂ¸m. Fikser at laderen ble begrenset til minimum nĂĄr voltageSystem var feilkonfigurert. Faller tilbake til watt-basert beregning nĂĄr fasedata ikke er tilgjengelig.

0.6.0.en: Multi-charger support: available headroom is now pooled and split evenly across all actively charging cars â€” a second connected-but-idle car no longer steals half the budget. EV charger phase count (1-phase / 3-phase) is now auto-detected from the live power/current ratio; no manual electrical config needed. Strict profile raised to 95% safety margin. Settings migration resets voltageSystem to auto on first start after update. Devices tab now always shows the EV charger as controlled by Power Guard while a car is connected and charging. Fixed a calculation bug that could cause charger current adjustments to be silently skipped.
0.6.0.no: StĂ¸tte for flere ladere: tilgjengelig effekt samles og fordeles likt mellom alle biler som faktisk lader â€” en tilkoblet-men-hvilende bil stjeler ikke lenger halve budsjettet. Fase-antall for EV-lader (enfase / trefase) detekteres nĂĄ automatisk fra live effekt/strĂ¸m-forholdet; ingen manuell konfigurasjon trengs. Streng profil hevet til 95% sikkerhetsmargin. Innstillingsmigrering nullstiller spenningssystem til auto ved fĂ¸rste oppstart etter oppdatering. Enheter-fanen viser nĂĄ alltid EV-laderen som styrt av Power Guard mens en bil er tilkoblet og lader. Rettet en beregningsfeil som kunne fĂ¸re til at strĂ¸mjusteringer ble stille hoppet over.

0.6.6.en: $changelog = "Fixed thermostat bounce blocking priority list. Fixed Panelovn ON badge when mitigated. Heaters tab uses power sensor as authoritative source."; echo $changelog | homey app publish

0.8.1.en: Added Home / Night / Away / Holiday mode engine

0.8.14.en: UI: Settings and System moved into Overview tab as sub-tabs (Overview / Settings / System) â€” reduces main tab bar clutter. Smart tab and Heaters tab are now mutually exclusive: Smart tab visible only when Smart Price Control is ON, Heaters tab visible only when OFF. Active Mode card hidden on Overview when Smart Price Control is OFF. Thermostat temperature control fixed: dual-format setCapabilityValue handles homey-api version differences. _applyMode now accepts optional filterDeviceId â€” changing a single device pref only re-applies that device, preventing EV chargers from being triggered on every thermostat click. All controlFloorHeater errors now surfaced in Log tab.

0.8.18.en: EV charger anti-hunt fix: charger no longer oscillates up/down around the power limit. Increases are now rate-limited (max +2A per 60s), decreases remain fast (15s). Safety buffer increased from 200W to 400W to absorb household fluctuation.

0.8.19.en: Critical fix: Easee chargers were misidentified as FutureHome, causing full on/off cycling instead of smooth current control. Fixed brand detection so Easee always uses Ladegrense (current limit) not pause/resume. Added proactive load shedding: when EV needs power, lower-priority devices (e.g. water heater) are turned off automatically. Safety buffer increased to 1000W.

0.8.20.en: UI: Moved Power Meter device selector from Overview tab to Settings tab, placed below Power Limit.

0.8.21.en: Fix: Charging Schedule (hours needed / finish by time) now saves correctly even when Homey Logic variables are not set up. Values are stored in app settings and synced to Logic variables if they exist.

0.8.22.en: Fix: EV charger test diagnostic no longer misidentifies Easee as FutureHome. Fix: charger no longer jumps to 16A after a pause â€” step-up cap now correctly applies when resuming from untracked state.

0.8.23.en: Fixed: Easee chargers were misidentified as FutureHome, causing the charger to oscillate on/off instead of using smooth current control â€” root cause of hunting behaviour. Fixed: test charger diagnostic now correctly identifies Easee (was showing FutureHome). Fixed: charging schedule (hours needed / finish by) no longer resets to 0 â€” values now saved in app settings as primary storage, synced to Homey Logic variables if they exist. UI: Power Meter device selector moved from Overview tab to Settings tab. UI: Capacity tariff daily peaks now shown as a monthly calendar with medals on the top-3 days. Removed fixed safety buffer from EV budget â€” strict mode's built-in 5% margin is sufficient.
0.8.23.no: Fiks: Easee-ladere ble feilidentifisert som FutureHome og forĂĄrsaket av/pĂĄ-oscillering i stedet for jevn strĂ¸mstyring â€” rotĂĄrsak til jaktadferd. Fiks: ladertest-diagnostikk identifiserer nĂĄ Easee korrekt (viste FutureHome). Fiks: ladeplan (timer nĂ¸dvendig / ferdig innen) nullstilles ikke lenger til 0 â€” verdier lagres nĂĄ i app-innstillinger som primĂ¦rlager, synkroniseres til Homey Logic-variabler hvis de finnes. UI: EffektmĂĄler-velger flyttet fra Oversikt-fanen til Innstillinger-fanen. UI: Effekttariff daglige topper vises nĂĄ som en mĂĄnedlig kalender med medaljer pĂĄ topp-3 dager. Fjernet fast sikkerhetsmargin fra EV-budsjettet â€” streng modus sin innebygde 5%-margin er tilstrekkelig.

0.8.25.en: Car device picker (auto battery polling), Zaptec 1-phase fix, charging status fix, Norgespris flat-rate fix

0.8.26.en: Per-charger EV status UI (connected/charging/should-charge per charger), 2-minute grace window to prevent mismatch flicker during current adjustments, mismatch only shown when car should charge but isn't, battery full (100%) no longer triggers mismatch warning, battery reports moved above charging schedule, battery report entries shown on separate lines

0.8.28.en: Mode buttons now show a loading spinner and are disabled while the mode change is being applied â€” prevents accidental double-press. HAN meter auto-detection improved: when multiple meter-like devices exist, the one with the highest current power reading is selected (fixes Frient being skipped in favour of an unconfigured Futurehome dongle at 0 W). Active Mode button styling fixed â€” Holiday button no longer appears taller than others.
0.8.28.no: Modusknapper viser nĂĄ en lasteindikator og deaktiveres mens modus-endringen behandles â€” forhindrer utilsiktet dobbelttrykk. HAN-meterdeteksjon forbedret: nĂĄr flere meter-lignende enheter finnes, velges den med hĂ¸yest aktuell effektavlesning (fikser at Frient ble forbigĂĄtt til fordel for en ukonfigurert Futurehome-dongle pĂĄ 0 W). Modus-knapp-styling fikset â€” Ferie-knappen ser ikke lenger hĂ¸yere ut enn de andre.

0.8.29.en: Smart charging: replaced smart-skip logic with cheapest-hours rule â€” when a deadline and hours needed are set, Power Guard picks the N cheapest hours before the deadline and charges at max during those hours only (Off during all others). Hysteresis is now bypassed when the deadline rule is active, preventing it from overriding an Off decision back to Low during normal-price hours.
0.8.29.no: Smart lading: erstattet smart-hopp-logikk med billigste-timer-regel â€” nĂĄr frist og timer nĂ¸dvendig er satt, velger Power Guard de N billigste timene fĂ¸r fristen og lader pĂĄ maks kun i disse timene (Av i alle andre timer). Hysteresen omgĂĄs nĂĄ nĂĄr deadline-regelen er aktiv, slik at den ikke kan overstyre en Av-beslutning tilbake til Lav i normale pristimer.

0.8.30.en: EV tab: updated smart charging explanation to reflect cheapest-hours rule. Renamed "Hours needed (manual fallback)" to "Hours needed (if no car device linked)" for clarity. Updated Finish charging by hint text.
0.8.30.no: EV-fanen: oppdatert forklaring av smart ladelogikk til ĂĄ gjenspeile billigste-timer-regelen. OmdĂ¸pte "Timer nĂ¸dvendig (manuell reserve)" til "Timer nĂ¸dvendig (hvis ingen bilenhet er koblet til)" for klarhet. Oppdatert hjelpetekst for Ferdig ladet innen.

0.8.35.en: Fix: EV charger no longer oscillates on/off every 60-90 seconds. Root causes fixed: (1) 2-second delay added between setting current limit and resuming charger, closing the gap that caused 16A startup spikes. (2) Dual engine conflict removed â€” one engine now owns all charger current decisions. (3) Charger reporting Completed mid-session is now handled automatically with a current re-issue. (4) Minimum current (6A) preferred over a full pause when overrun would be small, reducing how often pause/resume is triggered. (5) 500W restore dead band prevents immediate re-overload after restore. (6) App learns each charger's real hardware current ceiling from confirmed readings â€” no manual configuration needed (fixes two-charger setups where one charger was configured above its physical limit). (7) Thermostat restore cooldown no longer blocked by charger cycling.
0.8.35.no: Fiks: EV-lader oscillerer ikke lenger av/pĂĄ hvert 60-90 sekund. RotĂĄrsaker fikset: (1) 2 sekunders forsinkelse lagt til mellom ĂĄ sette strĂ¸mgrense og starte laderen, lukker gapet som forĂĄrsaket 16A oppstartstopper. (2) Dobbelmotorkonflikt fjernet â€” Ă©n motor eier nĂĄ alle laderstrĂ¸mbeslutninger. (3) Lader som rapporterer Ferdig midt i en sesjon hĂĄndteres nĂĄ automatisk. (4) MinimumsstrĂ¸m (6A) foretrekkes over full pause nĂĄr overbelastningen er liten. (5) 500W gjenoppretting-dĂ¸dband forhindrer umiddelbar re-overbelastning. (6) Appen lĂ¦rer hver laders reelle hardware-strĂ¸mtak fra bekreftede avlesninger automatisk. (7) Termostatgjenoppretting blokkeres ikke lenger av ladersykluser.

0.8.34.en: Bug fixes: Charger Mode now shows â€” when no connected car needs charging (was incorrectly showing Fast charge). Fixed price evaluation crash caused by const declaration (finalMode). Norgespris toggle now works correctly. Opening the Smart tab triggers a fresh price refresh. Modes tab thermostats have On/Off/â€” buttons with temperature memory.

0.8.36.en: Fix: thermostats and heaters are no longer turned off when the EV charger is paused by the price engine (ekstremt dyr / Mode=av) — proactive load shedding now skips devices when the charger has no intention of running. Fix: auto-detected charger phase (1-phase / 3-phase) is now persisted across restarts so it shows immediately without waiting for new readings. Fix: phase detection now requires 3 consistent readings before confirming, preventing false 1-phase detection during charger ramp-up.
0.8.36.no: Fiks: termostater og varmere slĺs ikke lenger av nĺr EV-laderen er satt pĺ pause av prismotoren (ekstremt dyr / Modus=av) — proaktiv lastavlastning hopper nĺ over enheter nĺr laderen ikke har til hensikt ĺ kjřre. Fiks: automatisk oppdaget laderfase (1-fase / 3-fase) lagres nĺ pĺ tvers av omstarter slik at den vises umiddelbart uten ĺ vente pĺ nye avlesninger. Fiks: fasedeteksjon krever nĺ 3 konsistente avlesninger fřr bekreftelse, for ĺ hindre feil 1-fase-deteksjon under oppramping av lader.
